entity.summary: Solana proprietary-market-maker decentralized exchange with substantial current spot-swap volume and large cumulative exchange activity.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies GoonFi as a Solana Prop AMM and reports substantial current 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume. The same registry records a March 28, 2026 protocol-logic incident, but this routine growth record does not create a canonical event without a separately reviewed source package. A stable first-party website URL was not recovered in this review pass, so URL fields remain unset.

evidence.title: GoonFi volume metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies GoonFi as a Solana Prop AMM and reports substantial non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume plus large cumulative volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: GoonFi protocol API record
evidence.notes: Structured protocol-detail API supplements the exchange identity and Solana protocol context.

evidence.title: GoonFi DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently preserves GoonFi in the current DEX-volume registry and corroborates active exchange activity.
